message:
fix(web): gate keyboard handlers on viewport visibility to prevent multi-viz conflicts

All 5 interactive visualizations on /core_flywheel register global keydown
handlers for Arrow/Space navigation. Without viewport gating, pressing
ArrowRight advanced ALL visualizations simultaneously since they all
listen on window. Now each handler checks isInView before responding,
so only the viz currently in the viewport handles keyboard input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
